texto: Many things are thrown our way in this game of life. It's how you deal with them that shows your true character. I want all of you to feel the hope, love & passion I feel for the upcoming year & the rest of my life. I want ALL of you to not only go for your dreams, but have a damn ass good time doing it! Love & Warmth, May ♥
explicacao: Citação de May Water/May B. Wilde sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Many things are thrown our way in this game of life.
